sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47602" key="h(rw=|ssa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡρῷσσα</orth>, <sense id="n47602.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἡρώϊσσα</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡρωστής</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἡρωϊστής</ref></xr>, Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Dritter Bericht</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117</biblScope> </bibl>(<placeName TEIform="placeName">Tire</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
